data.title: T.A.T. Technologies Reports Strong Q3 2025 Results
data.description:
T.A.T. Technologies Ltd ( (TATT) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information T.A.T. Technologies Ltd presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

T.A.T. Technologies Ltd. is a prominent provider of products and services for the aerospace and defense industries, specializing in original equipment manufacturing and maintenance, repair, and overhaul services for aviation components.

In the third quarter of 2025, T.A.T. Technologies reported a significant increase in financial performance, with a 14.3% rise in revenues compared to the same period in 2024, reaching $46.2 million. The company also saw substantial growth in gross profit and net income, reflecting its strong market position.

Key financial metrics for the quarter include a 36.8% increase in gross profit to $11.6 million, a 52.6% rise in operating income to $5.3 million, and a 69.0% surge in net income to $4.8 million. The company also reported a 34.4% increase in adjusted EBITDA, highlighting its operational efficiency and robust cash flow generation.

Looking ahead, T.A.T. Technologies is poised for continued growth, leveraging its strong cash position and working capital to explore new opportunities and expand its capabilities. The management remains confident in sustaining growth and improving margins through 2026 and beyond.

data.title: Synergy CHC Corp. Sustains Profitability with Revenue Growth
data.description:
Synergy Chc Corp ( (SNYR) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Synergy Chc Corp presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Synergy CHC Corp., a consumer health and wellness company, is known for its flagship brands FOCUSfactor and Flat Tummy, which are distributed across major retailers in the U.S., Canada, and the U.K. In its latest earnings report, Synergy CHC Corp. announced its eleventh consecutive quarter of profitability, highlighting a 12.4% increase in revenue to $8.0 million and a gross margin expansion to 70.9%. The company also reported a successful $4.4 million public offering, which is expected to support further growth and brand expansion. Key financial metrics showed income from operations increased to $1.28 million, although net income decreased to $125.3 thousand, reflecting increased operating expenses. Strategic moves included expanding retail partnerships with major retailers like Kroger and Wakefern, and appointing a former Costco executive to its board. Looking ahead, Synergy CHC Corp. remains optimistic about its growth prospects, supported by its strengthened retail and distribution network and recent capital infusion.

data.title: Meiji Holdings Reports Mixed Financial Results for 2026
data.description:
Meiji Holdings Co ( (MEJHF) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Meiji Holdings Co presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Meiji Holdings Co., Ltd. is a prominent player in the food and pharmaceutical industries, known for its diverse product offerings ranging from dairy and chocolate to pharmaceuticals and vaccines. In its latest earnings report for the first six months of the fiscal year ending March 2026, Meiji Holdings reported a modest increase in net sales to JPY 574.885 billion, marking a 1.0% rise from the previous year. However, the company faced challenges with a decline in operating profit by 7.8% to JPY 40.942 billion and a significant drop in profit attributable to owners of parent by 20.1% to JPY 21.477 billion. The food segment saw mixed results, with the chocolate and food solutions businesses showing growth, while the nutrition business faced declines. The pharmaceutical segment experienced a rise in net sales, but operating profit fell sharply due to increased R&D expenses and the impact of drug price revisions. Looking ahead, Meiji Holdings remains focused on its 2026 Medium-Term Business Plan, with expectations for continued growth in certain segments despite ongoing challenges in others.

data.title: Xenetic Biosciences Reports Q3 2025 Financial Results
data.description:
Xenetic Biosciences, Inc. ( (XBIO) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Xenetic Biosciences, Inc. presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Xenetic Biosciences, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company based in Framingham, Massachusetts, specializing in innovative immuno-oncology technologies aimed at treating difficult cancers. The company’s proprietary DNase technology targets neutrophil extracellular traps to enhance the effectiveness of existing cancer treatments.

In its latest earnings report, Xenetic Biosciences highlighted a notable increase in royalty revenue, reaching approximately $1.03 million for the third quarter of 2025, compared to $614,243 in the same period last year. Despite this revenue growth, the company reported a net loss of $509,940 for the quarter, which is an increase from the $436,671 loss in the previous year.

Key financial metrics from the report include a decrease in cash reserves to $4.12 million from $6.17 million at the end of 2024, and an increase in total liabilities to $1.11 million. The company continues to invest heavily in research and development, with expenses in this area rising to $756,482 for the quarter.

Xenetic Biosciences is actively pursuing strategic alternatives to maximize shareholder value, including potential mergers or asset sales. The company remains focused on advancing its DNase technology into clinical trials for pancreatic carcinoma and other solid tumors, while also exploring additional funding opportunities to support its long-term initiatives.

Looking ahead, Xenetic Biosciences is optimistic about its prospects, with management confident in its ability to secure necessary capital and continue developing its promising DNase technology. The company is committed to maintaining its Nasdaq listing and exploring strategic partnerships to enhance its market position.

data.title: Cybin, Inc. Reports Q2 2026 Financial Results
data.description:
Cybin, Inc. ( (CYBN) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Cybin, Inc. presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Cybin, Inc. is a clinical-stage neuropsychiatry company focused on developing innovative treatment options for mental health conditions, operating primarily in the biotechnology sector.

In its latest earnings report, Cybin announced its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026, highlighting significant progress in its clinical trials and a successful financing round that underscores investor confidence in the company’s potential.

Key highlights from the report include the completion of enrollment in the Phase 2 study of CYB004 for generalized anxiety disorder and ongoing progress in the Phase 3 studies of CYB003 for major depressive disorder. The company also received approval to conduct the EMBRACE study in several countries, expanding its global clinical footprint. Financially, Cybin reported a net loss of $33.7 million, a decrease from the previous year, and a strengthened cash position of $248 million post-financing.

Cybin’s strategic focus remains on advancing its late-stage programs and preparing for commercialization, supported by a robust intellectual property portfolio. The company is also in the process of searching for a new CEO to lead its next phase of growth.

Looking ahead, Cybin is poised to achieve critical clinical milestones in 2026, with expectations to deliver transformative therapies that address unmet needs in mental healthcare, as it continues to build on its scientific and operational momentum.

data.title: Alpha Cognition Inc. Reports Q3 2025 Earnings and Strategic Progress
data.description:
Alpha Cognition Inc ( (ACOG) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Alpha Cognition Inc presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Alpha Cognition Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing treatments for neurodegenerative diseases, including Alzheimer’s Disease and Cognitive Impairment with Traumatic Brain Injury. The company operates in the healthcare sector and is distinguished by its commitment to addressing conditions with limited treatment options.

In its latest earnings report for the quarter ended September 30, 2025, Alpha Cognition Inc. highlighted significant developments, including the commercialization of its product ZUNVEYL, which received FDA approval for treating mild-to-moderate Alzheimer’s disease. The company reported total revenue of $2.84 million for the quarter, marking a substantial increase from the previous year when no revenue was recorded.

Key financial metrics from the report indicate that Alpha Cognition’s total revenue for the nine months ended September 30, 2025, was $7.43 million, driven by product sales and licensing revenue. However, the company also reported a net loss of $13.81 million for the same period, reflecting high operating expenses primarily due to selling, general, and administrative costs.

Despite the net loss, the company showed strategic progress through its licensing agreement with CMS International Development and Management Limited, which includes potential milestone payments and royalties. This agreement is expected to enhance the company’s revenue streams in the Asia-Pacific region.

Looking forward, Alpha Cognition Inc. remains focused on expanding its market presence and continuing its research and development efforts. The management anticipates leveraging strategic partnerships and financing options to support its operations and commercialization plans for ZUNVEYL, while acknowledging the challenges of securing additional funding on favorable terms.

data.description:

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Yellow Pages Limited is a Canadian digital media and marketing company that connects buyers and sellers in the local economy through its online properties and print directories. In its third-quarter 2025 earnings report, Yellow Pages Limited highlighted its continued profitability and cash generation, despite facing revenue declines. The company reported an 8.1% year-over-year decrease in total revenues, amounting to $48.3 million, with digital revenues down by 6.2% and print revenues impacted by a Canada Post strike. Adjusted EBITDA for the quarter was 20.6% of revenue, reflecting ongoing investments and cost optimizations. Despite these challenges, the company declared a quarterly dividend and completed a voluntary pension plan contribution. Looking ahead, Yellow Pages Limited remains focused on stabilizing revenue and enhancing strategic execution under its new leadership team, positioning itself for medium to long-term success.

Birchtech Corp. is a Delaware-based company specializing in specialty activated carbon technologies for mercury emissions capture in the coal-fired utility sector and is expanding into water purification technologies. In its latest earnings report for the quarter ending September 30, 2025, Birchtech Corp. reported a net income of $788,012, a significant improvement from the net loss of $457,546 in the same quarter of the previous year. The company achieved total revenues of $7.36 million, driven by a substantial increase in license revenue, which rose to $2.6 million from $133,125. Despite a decrease in product revenue, the company managed to improve its gross profit to $4.03 million, up from $1.59 million in the previous year. Operating expenses increased slightly, but the company still reported an operating income of $810,848. Looking ahead, Birchtech Corp. is focused on maintaining its revenue streams from mercury emissions control while exploring new opportunities in the water treatment market, supported by recent investments in laboratory facilities and personnel.

data.title: Shimmick Corporation Reports Q3 2025 Earnings and Growth
data.description:
Shimmick Corporation ( (SHIM) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Shimmick Corporation presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Shimmick Corporation is a prominent infrastructure solutions provider specializing in water, electrical, and other critical infrastructure construction services, operating primarily in the United States. The company is known for its innovative and technology-driven approach to infrastructure challenges.

In its third-quarter 2025 earnings report, Shimmick Corporation reported a revenue of $142 million, with significant contributions from its Shimmick Projects. The company also highlighted a backlog increase and a positive adjusted EBITDA for the first time in four quarters, indicating operational momentum.

Key financial metrics from the report include a 5% year-over-year increase in total revenue, excluding a one-time settlement from the previous year, and a 67% year-over-year increase in gross margin for Shimmick Projects. The backlog reached approximately $754 million, marking a 15% quarter-over-quarter increase, and the company added $190 million in new work during the quarter. Despite these positive indicators, Shimmick reported a net loss of $4 million, primarily due to Non-Core Projects.

Looking ahead, Shimmick’s management remains optimistic about 2026, driven by strong bidding activity and positive market conditions, particularly in California and Texas. The company reaffirms its full-year 2025 guidance, expecting Shimmick Projects revenue to be at the higher end of the range and adjusted EBITDA at the lower end, reflecting confidence in its strategic direction and growth prospects.

SharpLink Gaming, Inc., headquartered in Minneapolis, Minnesota, is a publicly traded company known for adopting Ethereum (ETH) as its primary treasury reserve asset, aligning itself with the future of digital capital and offering investors exposure to the world’s leading smart-contract platform.

In its latest earnings report for the third quarter of 2025, SharpLink Gaming, Inc. highlighted a significant increase in revenue and net income, driven by the strategic execution of its ETH treasury strategy. The company has effectively deployed its ETH holdings into yield-generating staking, aiming for long-term value accretion for its shareholders.

The company’s financial performance showed remarkable growth, with total revenue surging to approximately $10.8 million, marking an increase of over 1,100% compared to the same period last year. Net income also rose sharply to approximately $104.3 million, a significant turnaround from the net loss reported in the previous year’s third quarter. Additionally, SharpLink’s ETH holdings increased, reflecting its commitment to enhancing Ethereum DeFi yields through strategic partnerships and deployments.

Operationally, SharpLink authorized a $1.5 billion stock repurchase program and expanded its executive leadership team, demonstrating its commitment to strengthening its market position. The company also announced collaborations to deploy a substantial portion of its ETH treasury on advanced platforms to unlock enhanced yields, further solidifying its role in the Ethereum ecosystem.

Looking ahead, SharpLink Gaming, Inc. remains focused on dynamically managing its capital and pursuing sophisticated yield strategies. With its strategic initiatives and partnerships, the company is well-positioned to capitalize on the accelerating Ethereum institutional supercycle, aiming to deliver sustained value to its shareholders.

data.description:

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

FrontView REIT, Inc. is an internally-managed real estate investment trust (REIT) that specializes in acquiring, owning, and managing properties with high visibility and frontage on busy roads, leased to a diverse group of tenants across the United States.

In its third quarter of 2025, FrontView REIT reported strong operational performance, with increased occupancy rates and significant financial gains, alongside strategic property acquisitions and dispositions.

Key highlights from the quarter include a net income of $5.5 million and an adjusted funds from operations (AFFO) of $8.8 million. The company successfully sold 15 properties for $30.1 million and acquired 3 new properties for $15.8 million. FrontView maintained a robust balance sheet with a net debt to adjusted EBITDAre ratio of 5.3x and a fixed charge coverage ratio of 3.3x.

FrontView’s strategic moves, including the amendment of its revolving credit facility and the hedging of $100 million of SOFR, demonstrate its proactive approach to managing financial obligations and positioning for future growth. The company also declared a dividend of $0.215 per share, reflecting a 6.3% yield.

Looking ahead, FrontView REIT remains optimistic about its growth prospects, with plans to utilize its bespoke perpetual preferred equity for further expansion in 2026, as indicated by its updated guidance for the full year 2025 and preliminary guidance for 2026.

OptimumBank Holdings, Inc. is a one-bank holding company based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, operating in the financial services sector with a focus on providing banking solutions through its wholly-owned subsidiary, OptimumBank.

In the third quarter of 2025, OptimumBank Holdings, Inc. reported strong financial results, with net earnings of $4.32 million, marking an increase from both the previous quarter and the same period last year. The company also saw significant growth in total deposits and gross loans, reflecting its robust performance amidst industry challenges.

Key financial highlights for the quarter include a 9.17% increase in total deposits from the previous quarter, reaching $959.49 million, and a 3.72% rise in the gross loan portfolio. The net interest margin improved to 4.37%, supported by higher yields on loans and a decrease in the cost of interest-bearing liabilities. Noninterest income also increased, driven by service charges, fee-based revenue, and gains on sales of government-guaranteed loans.

OptimumBank’s management expressed confidence in the company’s future, emphasizing its strong capital position and strategic investments in technology and talent. The company remains focused on expanding its customer base and enhancing shareholder value as it continues to navigate the evolving financial landscape.

Looking ahead, OptimumBank Holdings, Inc. aims to maintain its growth trajectory by leveraging its well-capitalized balance sheet and disciplined operational strategies. The company is committed to delivering sustainable financial performance and exploring new opportunities in the community banking sector.

data.title: Fluent, Inc. Reports Strong Growth in Commerce Media
data.description:
Fluent Inc ( (FLNT) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Fluent Inc presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Fluent, Inc. is a commerce media solutions provider that connects top-tier brands with engaged consumers through exclusive ad inventory and proprietary machine learning, primarily operating in the performance marketing sector. In its third quarter of 2025 financial results, Fluent reported a revenue of $47 million, with its Commerce Media Solutions segment showing significant growth, now accounting for 40% of the company’s consolidated revenue. The segment’s annual revenue run rate has surpassed $85 million, reflecting an 81% increase compared to the same period last year. Despite a decrease in overall revenue and a net loss of $7.6 million, Fluent’s strategic shift towards Commerce Media Solutions is evident, with the segment’s gross margin improving by 400 basis points from the previous quarter. Key partnerships with Authentic Brands and Databricks have been highlighted as strategic moves to enhance data intelligence and expand capabilities. The company also noted the success of its Rebuy Monetize partnership on the Shopify platform, demonstrating a significant increase in ad unit sessions. Looking forward, Fluent anticipates achieving adjusted EBITDA profitability in the fourth quarter of 2025 and expects full-year double-digit revenue growth and profitability in 2026, driven by the continued expansion of its Commerce Media Solutions business.

National Energy Services Reunited Corp. (NESR) is a leading provider of integrated energy services in the Middle East and North Africa, specializing in production and drilling services to enhance reservoir performance.

In its third-quarter 2025 financial results, NESR reported a revenue of $295.3 million and a net income of $17.7 million, marking a 16.7% increase from the previous quarter. Despite a challenging market environment, the company maintained strong profitability through cost reduction and operational efficiency.

Key financial metrics for the quarter included an adjusted EBITDA of $64.0 million and a diluted EPS of $0.18, both showing improvements on a sequential basis. However, year-over-year comparisons showed declines in revenue and adjusted net income, reflecting broader market challenges. The company’s free cash flow for the nine months ending September 2025 was $25.0 million, down from $103.0 million in the previous year, primarily due to increased accounts receivable.

NESR’s management remains optimistic, focusing on maintaining strong margins and pursuing growth opportunities, particularly with new contracts like the Saudi Jafurah integrated frac contract. The company is poised for expansion, supported by strategic investments and operational readiness.

Looking ahead, NESR aims to enhance working capital efficiency and deliver sustained value to shareholders, leveraging its strategic partnerships and expanding contract portfolio to drive future growth.

Clene Inc. is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company focused on developing nanotechnology therapeutics for neurological disorders, including ALS, MS, and Parkinson’s disease. In its latest earnings report, Clene Inc. revealed a continued struggle with financial losses, reporting a net loss of $8.8 million for the third quarter of 2025, compared to a $8.0 million loss in the same period last year. Marpai, Inc. is a technology platform company specializing in healthcare technology and Third-Party Administration (TPA) services, primarily competing in the self-funded employer health plans sector. The company has been focusing on delivering value-oriented health plan services to employers who directly pay for employee health benefits.

In its third-quarter 2025 earnings report, Marpai, Inc. highlighted significant operational and financial improvements, driven by cost discipline and operational efficiency. The company is positioning itself for strong growth in 2026, as evidenced by its strategic transformation efforts.

Key financial highlights from the report include a 24% reduction in operating expenses, a 9% narrowing of the operating loss, and a 2% improvement in net loss. These metrics demonstrate Marpai’s progress toward profitability and its focus on enhancing shareholder value. Additionally, the company has successfully expanded its client base and improved its earnings per share by $0.10.

Looking ahead, Marpai is optimistic about its growth prospects, with a strong pipeline for 2026 and a committed client base. The company aims to achieve profitability in the first quarter of 2026, leveraging its durable operating model and strategic initiatives in automation and data-driven claims management.

In conclusion, Marpai, Inc. is transitioning from a turnaround story to a profitability story, supported by its strategic positioning and capital initiatives. The company’s recent $3.9 million capital infusion through a Private Investment in Public Equity (PIPE) transaction underscores confidence in its business model and potential for sustained growth in the healthcare administration space.

data.title: Biofrontera Inc. Reports Q3 2025 Results and Strategic Moves
data.description:
Biofrontera, Inc. ( (BFRI) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Biofrontera, Inc. presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Biofrontera Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing photodynamic therapy (PDT) for dermatological conditions, particularly actinic keratoses, a pre-cancerous skin lesion. The company is based in the United States and is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker BFRI.

In its third-quarter 2025 earnings report, Biofrontera Inc. announced stable revenues for the first nine months of the year, despite a decline in third-quarter revenues due to advanced purchases in the previous year. The company highlighted strategic moves, including the acquisition of U.S. assets from Biofrontera AG and the divestiture of its Xepi antibiotic cream.

Key financial metrics showed a slight decline in revenues to $7.0 million in Q3 2025 from $9.0 million in Q3 2024, attributed to the prior year’s advanced purchases. Operating expenses decreased by 5% year-over-year, and the company reported a net loss of $6.6 million for the quarter. Notably, Biofrontera completed a significant acquisition of Ameluz and RhodoLED assets, which is expected to enhance gross margins and long-term profitability.

The company is optimistic about its future, with expectations of substantial revenue growth in the fourth quarter and beyond. Biofrontera’s management remains confident in achieving full-year sales objectives, supported by the growing demand for its Ameluz-PDT treatment and strategic operational changes.

Looking ahead, Biofrontera Inc. is focused on expanding the use of its Ameluz product for additional indications and improving its financial leverage through strategic acquisitions and partnerships. The company’s management is committed to sustaining growth and profitability in the coming quarters.

Southland Holdings, Inc., headquartered in Grapevine, Texas, is a prominent provider of specialized infrastructure construction services, operating in sectors such as bridges, tunneling, transportation, and water treatment across North America and globally.

In its third-quarter 2025 earnings report, Southland Holdings reported a revenue increase to $213.3 million, marking a 23.1% rise from the previous year. Despite this growth, the company faced a net loss of $75.3 million, primarily due to a non-cash tax charge and adjustments related to legacy projects.

Key financial metrics revealed a turnaround in gross profit, which stood at $3.3 million compared to a gross loss of $51.1 million in the same quarter last year. The company’s EBITDA improved significantly, reducing the loss to $3.5 million from $58.7 million in the previous year. However, the net loss per share widened to $1.39 from $1.14. Southland’s backlog remains robust at $2.26 billion, indicating strong future demand.

Looking ahead, Southland’s management remains optimistic about the company’s core business performance, despite the current challenges. They are focused on winding down legacy backlogs and leveraging the growing demand for critical infrastructure projects in their core markets.

Expion360, Inc., based in Redmond, Oregon, designs, assembles, and distributes premium lithium batteries primarily for recreational vehicles, marine, golf, industrial, residential, and off-the-grid applications, utilizing lithium iron phosphate technology known for its high energy density and safety. In its latest earnings report, Expion360, Inc. showcased significant improvements in its financial performance for the quarter ended September 30, 2025. The company reported net sales of $2.39 million, a substantial increase from $1.39 million in the same period last year, reflecting a growing demand for its products. The company’s balance sheet shows an increase in cash and cash equivalents to $4.29 million, up from $547,565 at the end of 2024, indicating improved liquidity. However, Expion360 remains cautious about its future, with management acknowledging the need to address ongoing challenges such as pricing pressures, supply chain dependencies, and customer concentration. Looking forward, Expion360’s management is focused on increasing revenue, managing operational expenses, and securing additional capital to sustain growth and achieve profitability.

With facilities in the U.S., Hong Kong, and India, M-tron is known for its engineering-centric approach and customer support throughout the product lifecycle.

Key financial metrics from the report include a gross margin of 44.0% for the third quarter of 2025, down from 47.8% in the same quarter of 2024. Net income for the quarter was $1.8 million, a decrease from $2.3 million the previous year. Despite these declines, the company’s adjusted EBITDA remained relatively stable at $3.18 million, compared to $3.3 million in 2024.

Looking ahead, M-tron Industries is set to release its full financial results for the third quarter on November 12, 2025. The company remains focused on providing high-quality frequency control solutions and supporting its customers through innovative engineering and product development. data.description:
Traws Pharma, Inc. ( (TRAW) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Traws Pharma, Inc. presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions

Traws Pharma, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel therapies for respiratory viral diseases, including COVID-19 and influenza.

In its third-quarter 2025 earnings report, Traws Pharma highlighted significant progress in its antiviral programs, including ongoing Phase 2 studies for ratutrelvir, a potential COVID-19 treatment, and advancements in its bird flu and seasonal flu treatment, Tivoxavir Marboxil. The company also reported a notable reduction in costs and the acquisition of significant intellectual property assets.

Key financial metrics for the quarter showed a decrease in cash and cash equivalents to $6.4 million from $21.3 million at the end of 2024. The company reported zero revenue for the quarter, down from $57,000 in the same period last year. However, Traws Pharma managed to reduce its net loss to $4.0 million from $8.5 million in the previous year, driven by decreased research and development and general administrative expenses.

Strategically, Traws Pharma is advancing its antiviral candidates, with ratutrelvir showing promise in reducing COVID-19 rebound and Long COVID risks. Tivoxavir Marboxil is positioned for potential inclusion in government stockpiling initiatives for pandemic preparedness. The company is also seeking partnerships to further develop its legacy oncology assets.

Looking ahead, Traws Pharma remains focused on advancing its clinical trials and exploring strategic partnerships to enhance its pipeline and financial position, with anticipated data from ongoing studies expected by the end of 2025.

Avenue Therapeutics, Inc. is a specialty pharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing therapies for neurologic diseases, with a current focus on intravenous tramadol for post-operative acute pain. The latest earnings report for the quarter ended September 30, 2025, reveals significant financial and strategic developments for Avenue Therapeutics. The company reported a net loss of $683,000 for the quarter, a substantial improvement from the $3.1 million loss in the same period last year. This reduction in losses is attributed to a decrease in operating expenses, which fell to $724,000 from $3.2 million, primarily due to reduced research and development costs. Avenue also reported other revenue of $1.4 million for the nine months ended September 30, 2025, related to a terminated license agreement with AnnJi Pharmaceutical Co. Ltd. Despite these improvements, Avenue continues to face challenges, including its delisting from Nasdaq and ongoing financial uncertainties. The company has been trading on the over-the-counter market since March 2025. Looking ahead, Avenue Therapeutics remains focused on securing additional funding to support its operations and potential Phase 3 safety study for IV tramadol, as it continues to navigate financial challenges and strategic shifts.

data.title: Reviva Pharmaceuticals Reports Q3 2025 Financial Progress
data.description:
Reviva Pharmaceuticals Holdings, Inc. ( (RVPH) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Reviva Pharmaceuticals Holdings, Inc. presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Reviva Pharmaceuticals Holdings, Inc. is a late-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing next-generation therapeutics for central nervous system, inflammatory, and cardiometabolic diseases. The company is known for its innovative drug candidates, including brilaroxazine, which is being developed for schizophrenia and other conditions.

Reviva Pharmaceuticals recently reported its third-quarter financial results for 2025, highlighting significant progress in its clinical programs. The company is preparing for a pre-NDA meeting with the FDA regarding brilaroxazine’s approval for schizophrenia, with a potential NDA submission targeted for the second quarter of 2026. Additionally, Reviva has secured a European patent for brilaroxazine’s use in treating pulmonary fibrosis, further strengthening its global patent portfolio.

Key financial metrics indicate a net loss of approximately $4.0 million for the third quarter of 2025, a significant improvement from the $8.4 million loss in the same period the previous year. The company’s cash and cash equivalents stood at $13.2 million as of September 30, 2025. Reviva also completed a public equity offering, raising $9.0 million in gross proceeds.

Reviva’s clinical advancements include the successful completion of a Phase 3 study evaluating brilaroxazine’s long-term safety and efficacy in schizophrenia patients. The study demonstrated robust efficacy and a favorable safety profile, with no significant side effects reported. The company continues to explore partnership opportunities to expand its pipeline and enhance its market presence.

Looking ahead, Reviva Pharmaceuticals remains focused on advancing its drug candidates through regulatory pathways and exploring strategic partnerships. The management is optimistic about brilaroxazine’s potential to redefine treatment expectations in schizophrenia and improve patient outcomes globally.

data.title: Candel Therapeutics Advances Cancer Therapies with Strong Q3
data.description:
Candel Therapeutics, Inc. ( (CADL) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Candel Therapeutics, Inc. presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Candel Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in the development of multimodal biological immunotherapies aimed at treating cancer, leveraging novel adenovirus and herpes simplex virus gene constructs.

In its third-quarter 2025 earnings report, Candel Therapeutics highlighted significant advancements in its clinical programs, particularly with its lead product candidates CAN-2409 and CAN-3110, while also securing a substantial financial boost through a term loan facility.

Key financial metrics revealed an increase in research and development expenses to $8.5 million, driven by manufacturing and regulatory costs for CAN-2409 programs. General and administrative expenses also rose to $4.7 million due to commercial readiness efforts. The company reported a net loss of $11.3 million for the quarter, with cash and cash equivalents standing at $87.0 million, bolstered by a $130 million term loan facility with Trinity Capital Inc.

Strategically, Candel is preparing to initiate a pivotal phase 3 trial for CAN-2409 in non-small cell lung cancer by Q2 2026 and plans to submit a Biologics License Application for CAN-2409 in prostate cancer by Q4 2026. The company also reported promising data from its phase 1b trial of CAN-3110 in recurrent high-grade glioma, supporting further clinical development.

Looking ahead, Candel Therapeutics is poised to advance its clinical pipeline with a focus on prostate and lung cancer therapies, supported by a strengthened financial position and strategic collaborations, aiming to deliver innovative cancer treatments in the coming years.

Sagimet Biosciences, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel therapeutics targeting metabolic and fibrotic pathways, primarily through fatty acid synthase (FASN) inhibitors, with a focus on conditions like MASH and acne.

In its latest earnings report for the third quarter of 2025, Sagimet Biosciences provided updates on its ongoing clinical trials and financial performance. The company highlighted its efforts in exploring the therapeutic potential of FASN inhibition across various indications, including the initiation of a Phase 1 trial for a combination of denifanstat and resmetirom, and the ongoing development of TVB-3567 for acne treatment.

Key financial metrics from the report include a decrease in research and development expenses to $9.7 million for the quarter, compared to $12.7 million in the same period last year. General and administrative expenses slightly increased to $4.6 million. The company reported a net loss of $12.9 million for the quarter, a reduction from the $14.6 million loss reported in the previous year. Sagimet’s cash and marketable securities stood at $125.5 million as of September 30, 2025.

Strategically, Sagimet is advancing its clinical programs with anticipated milestones, including the data readout from its Phase 1 trial in the first half of 2026 and potential progression to Phase 2 trials for both MASH and acne indications. The company also announced key promotions within its leadership team, reflecting its commitment to scientific and legal excellence.

Looking ahead, Sagimet Biosciences remains focused on advancing its clinical trials and exploring the potential of its FASN inhibitors to address unmet medical needs in metabolic and fibrotic conditions. The company aims to leverage positive trial outcomes to progress its drug candidates through regulatory pathways and into broader clinical applications.

Westwater Resources, Inc. is a company focused on the development and commercialization of battery-grade graphite materials, primarily operating in the mining and materials sector. The company is known for its efforts in advancing the Kellyton Graphite Plant in Alabama.

In its latest earnings report for the quarter ending September 30, 2025, Westwater Resources highlighted significant financial activities, including a notable increase in cash and cash equivalents, which rose to $12.9 million from $4.3 million at the end of 2024. The company also reported a net loss of $9.8 million for the quarter, reflecting ongoing investments in its graphite production facilities.

Key financial metrics from the report include total assets of $157.7 million, up from $146.4 million at the end of 2024, driven by continued capital expenditures in property, plant, and equipment. The company issued convertible notes totaling $10 million during the period, which contributed to the increase in liabilities to $19.7 million. Additionally, Westwater raised $13.4 million through the issuance of common stock, aiding its liquidity position.

Westwater Resources continues to focus on the development of its Kellyton Graphite Plant, which is integral to its strategy of becoming a leading supplier of battery-grade graphite materials. The company has successfully raised capital through equity offerings and convertible notes, which are expected to support its ongoing construction activities and operational needs.

Looking ahead, Westwater Resources remains committed to advancing its graphite production capabilities, with management expressing confidence in securing additional funding to support the completion of the Kellyton Graphite Plant. The company aims to capitalize on the growing demand for battery materials, driven by the electric vehicle market and other energy storage applications.
